rationale: Eight years as a full-stack/DevOps/frontend engineer with self-learner AI exposure only; lists Haystack as an advanced skill but career shows no production IR or ranking work, and a role at fictional company Dunder Mifflin is a hard honeypot signal.
Career is entirely in sales, marketing, and accounting (Wipro + Stark Industries fictional company); no engineering or ML work whatsoever.

Solid ML production experience (PyTorch, MLOps) with a strong IIT Delhi B.Sc AI pedigree, but specialization is entirely computer vision (ResNet, YOLO, Object Detection) with no evidence of NLP, IR, retrieval, or ranking work — a domain the JD explicitly flags as a disqualifier without NLP/IR crossover.
Only three years of experience in a project-manager/operations role at fictional Wayne Enterprises with no technical engineering or ML skills.

Advanced Milvus (59 months) and Semantic Search (28 months) skills are strong IR signals, with backend engineering at Flipkart and a startup, but career titles and summary skew data-engineering rather than ML ranking, and one stint at Accenture (IT services) is a mild negative.
Fourteen years in HR, project management, and customer support exclusively at IT-services firms (Infosys, TCS, Wipro) with no engineering or ML work.

Only 2.7 years of experience focused on data pipelines (Kafka, Spark, Airflow) with no IR, embeddings, or ranking work, and a significant stint at TCS (IT services) with no product-company ML exposure.

Career spans business analysis, accounting, and graphic design at IT-services and fictional companies (Stark Industries, Pied Piper) with no technical AI or engineering work despite listing BentoML as an intermediate skill.
Entire career in content writing, operations, graphic design, and sales at fictional companies (Pied Piper, Dunder Mifflin) with no ML or engineering relevance.
14.4 years across customer support, HR, civil engineering, and accounting at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Dunder Mifflin) with zero AI or software engineering background.
